assertions.text: Detects entry point mode 2 — existing codebase coverage mode
Reads and analyzes the existing source files in src/utils/ before writing tests
Skips the design gate because --skip-design flag was passed
Generates tests derived from reading specific source file contents (function signatures, return types, edge cases) — not just generic tests
Describes or resolves the tension between RED verification and existing implementations (characterization tests pass immediately against existing code)
Demonstrates the adapted hide-and-restore RED verification procedure for coverage mode (temporarily hide impl, verify import failures, restore, verify pass)
Produces a report showing coverage additions
